articles.title: OpenClaw 2026.4.24 beta 2
articles.summary:
Beta 2 fixes packaged bundled-plugin runtime mirrors on Windows and other copied-runtime installs so shared package-root dependencies remain resolvable during npm updates.

It also keeps future bundle...

## 2026.4.24

articles.title: openclaw 2026.4.23
articles.summary:
## 2026.4.23

### Changes

- Providers/OpenAI: add image generation and reference-image editing through Codex OAuth, so `openai/gpt-image-2` works without an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. Fixes #70703.
